productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Green Tshirt
description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, flock print and applique work on the front, and has a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The flock print on the front pays tribute to classic fashion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary cofmort. Pair it with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
